title: PDF Viewer fit-on-load + dark toolbar restored
description:
PDF Viewer now auto-fits to 90% panel width on every open/refresh (was stuck at 100% board zoom when fit flag was missing). Restored dark toolbar — white background limited to sheet area only. Scroll container shrink-wraps pages so no grey void below sheets.

Hard-refresh PipeSync (dbg65).

Who is affected: Private OVH server.
changeLog: Auto fit-to-width on viewer mount (not only workspace switch).
100% button in viewer re-runs fit instead of forcing zoom 1.
Dark toolbar restored; white only on PDF sheet scroll area.
Scroll shrink-wrap fixes grey margins below/beside pages.
